sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint warns that transcript job completion is not readiness but does not name a guard artifact.
decisionTaken: Every terminal worker result records TEL_READY_191_WORKER_COMPLETION_NOT_PROMOTION_AUTHORITY and must settle TelephonyEvidenceReadinessAssessment before promotionReadiness can change.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It makes TelephonyEvidenceReadinessAssessment the sole authority for promotion gating.
operationalRisk: Controllers that bypass the assessment contract would violate the model even if transcript jobs succeeded.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add route-level enforcement once task 193 wires canonical promotion.
